title: Narration response cache (Phase 18)
description: Cache effectiveness for the OPT-IN narration response cache. Hit rate is gated by NarrCacheGate (mechanical-honesty fail-CLOSED filter): responses containing HP/AC/damage patterns are bypassed, not cached. The savings_usd attribute estimates LLM-spend reduction. Cache is OFF by default (NARRCACHE_ENABLED=true required); a flat-zero hit rate when disabled is expected.

metrics.name: hit_rate
metrics.healthy_range: 10-30% hit rate during repeated narrative beats (resting, travel); 'bypass' visibility is a feature — it proves the mechanical-honesty gate is firing

metrics.name: size
metrics.healthy_range: Grows with unique (model_id, prompt_hashes) tuples seen; bounded by L1 LRU

metrics.name: savings_usd
metrics.healthy_range: Strictly non-negative; reported only on cache hits (miss/bypass don't emit the attribute)

query_recipe: Phoenix UI → Project 'eldritch-narrcache' → Three panels: (1) Filter span_name='eldritch.narrcache.call', plot count(layer='hit') / total grouped by eldritch.narrcache.layer over 1h. (2) Filter span_name='eldritch.narrcache.call', plot last(eldritch.narrcache.size) over 5m. (3) Filter span_name='eldritch.narrcache.call', plot sum(eldritch.narrcache.savings_usd) over 24h.
